Package org.apache.juneau.rest.client

Interface BodyConverter<T>

Type Parameters:
T - The type this converter handles.
public interface BodyConverter<T>
Converts a Java object passed to RestRequest.body(Object) into a TransportBody.

A list of converters is consulted in order; the first converter whose canConvert(Object) returns true wins. The default converter list (applied automatically by RestClient) handles the common cases:

  1. HttpBody — passed through directly (streaming preferred over buffering)
  2. InputStream — wrapped in a streaming body
  3. byte[] — wrapped in a byte-array body
  4. File — wrapped in a file body

Custom converters are registered on the builder and are prepended to the default list (checked before the defaults). Use the of(Class, ThrowingConverter) factory for concise lambdas:

Example:

RestClient client = RestClient.builder() .bodyConverter(BodyConverter.of(MyBean.class, bean -> TransportBody.of(StringBody.of(mySerializer.serialize(bean))))) .build();

Beta — API subject to change: This type is part of the next-generation REST client and HTTP stack (org.apache.juneau.marshall.ng.*). It is not API-frozen: binary- and source-incompatible changes may appear in the next major Juneau release (and possibly earlier).

See Also:
  • juneau-ng REST client
Since:
9.2.1

    BodyConverter.ThrowingConverter<T>
    A checked function used by of(Class, ThrowingConverter).

    boolean
    canConvert(Object value)
    Returns true if this converter can handle the given value.
    TransportBody
    convert(Object value)
    Converts the value to a TransportBody.

    Creates a BodyConverter from a type predicate and a converting lambda.

  • Method Details

    • canConvert

      boolean canConvert(Object value)
      Returns true if this converter can handle the given value.
      Parameters:
      value - The value passed to RestRequest.body(Object). May be null.
      Returns:
      true if convert(Object) should be called with this value.

    • convert

      TransportBody convert(Object value) throws IOException
      Converts the value to a TransportBody.
      Parameters:
      value - The value. Never null (converters are only called when canConvert(java.lang.Object) returns true).
      Returns:
      The transport body. Never null.
      Throws:
      IOException - If conversion fails.

    • of

      static <T> BodyConverter<T> of(Class<T> type, BodyConverter.ThrowingConverter<T> converter)
      Creates a BodyConverter from a type predicate and a converting lambda.

      The converter matches any value that is an instance of the given type.

      Type Parameters:
      T - The type to handle.
      Parameters:
      type - The type to match via instanceof. Must not be null.
      converter - The conversion function. Must not be null.
      Returns:
      A new converter. Never null.
